ut=null,Rt=null;function aa(){if(document.currentScript instanceof HTMLScriptElement)return document.currentScript;const e=document.querySelectorAll('script[data-webhook-url], script[src*="chat-widget"]');return e[e.length-1]??null}function fa(){const e=aa();if(!e?.dataset)return{};const{dataset:t}=e,n={};return t.webhookUrl&&(n.webhookUrl=t.webhookUrl),t.title&&(n.title=t.title),t.subline&&(n.subline=t.subline),t.logoUrl&&(n.logoUrl=t.logoUrl),t.welcomeMessage&&(n.welcomeMessage=t.welcomeMessage),t.source&&(n.source=t.source),t.primaryColor&&(n.primaryColor=t.primaryColor),n}function ua(e){const t={...xe,...window.SimpleKIChatConfig,...fa(),...e};return t.webhookUrl?t:(console.warn("[Simple-KI Chat] Initialisierung abgebrochen: webhookUrl fehlt. Bitte SimpleKIChatConfig oder data-webhook-url setzen."),null)}function da(){const e=document.getElementById("simple-ki-chat-mount");if(e)return e;const t=document.createElement("div");return t.id="simple-ki-chat-mount",t.style.cssText="all:initial;position:fixed;bottom:1rem;right:1rem;z-index:199999;display:block;pointer-events:none;",document.body.appendChild(t),t}function ha(){const e=document.createElement("div");e.style.cssText="all:initial;display:block;pointer-events:auto;";const t=e.attachShadow({mode:"open"}),n=document.createElement("style");n.textContent=ca,t.appendChild(n);const s=document.createElement("div");s.id="ski-chat-teleport",t.appendChild(s);const r=document.createElement("div");return t.appendChild(r),Rt?.appendChild(e),{widgetHost:r,teleportTarget:s}}function $s(e){const t=ua(e);if(!t)return;ut&&(ut.unmount(),ut=null),Rt=da(),Rt.innerHTML="";const{widgetHost:n,teleportTarget:s}=ha();ut=Fc(la,{webhookUrl:t.webhookUrl,title:t.title??xe.title,subline:t.subline??xe.subline,logoUrl:t.logoUrl??xe.logoUrl,welcomeMessage:t.welcomeMessage??xe.welcomeMessage,source:t.source??xe.source,primaryColor:t.primaryColor??xe.primaryColor,teleportTarget:s}),ut.mount(n)}function pa(){ut&&(ut.unmount(),ut=null),Rt&&(Rt.remove(),Rt=null)}window.SimpleKIChat={init:$s,destroy:pa},document.readyState==="loading"?document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded",()=>$s()):$s()})();
